name: Custom 2-Agent Debate
description: A workflow where two agents debate a topic and a judge synthesizes the final answer.

stages.name: Initial Drafts
stages.instruction: Draft an argument based on the topic. The Defender will support it, the Attacker will destroy it.

stages.name: Final Synthesis
stages.instruction: Read the arguments from the previous stage. Combine the best points into a final, unified conclusion.
